task_completion.visual_evidence: Email client search bar shows the keyword 'RAID' or 'Kernel'.

task_completion.description: Create the target folder for offline documents
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window or a 'Save As' dialog showing the directory path '/home/ga/Documents/OfflineDocs'.

task_completion.description: Save at least three relevant emails to the target folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager showing the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/OfflineDocs' with at least 3 saved files visible.

task_completion.description: Open a new email composition window
task_completion.visual_evidence: An email client composition window is open and visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Set the draft email recipient to dispatch@company.com
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'To' field in the email composition window contains 'dispatch@company.com'.

task_completion.description: Set the draft email subject to 'Offline docs ready'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Subject' field in the email composition window contains 'Offline docs ready' (or at least 'Offline docs').

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI email client to search and draft the email
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show an actual email application being used for searching and drafting, rather than terminal commands or a basic text editor.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI file manager or standard save dialogs to save the files
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show GUI file management or save dialogs rather than terminal commands (like 'mkdir' or 'cp') to create the folder and files.

integrity.description: The saved files appear to be genuine exported emails
integrity.visual_evidence: The files saved in the OfflineDocs folder have names or icons consistent with saved emails (e.g., .eml, .pdf, or email subject lines as filenames), not manually typed text files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target directory must be exactly '/home/ga/Documents/OfflineDocs'. There must be a minimum of 3 files saved in this directory. The draft email must be addressed to 'dispatch@company.com' and the subject must contain 'offline' or 'docs' (case-insensitive).
